title: Weekend story with connectors
subtitle: Tell a weekend story in order.
overview: Tell a weekend story in order.
A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: On Saturday, I cleaned my room.
After that, I cooked dinner and watched a movie.
之后，我做了晚饭并看了一部电影。
What did you do on Saturday?
I cleaned my room and cooked dinner.
我打扫了房间并做了晚饭。

items.en: On Saturday, I cleaned my room.
After that, I cooked dinner and watched a movie.
items.zh: 之后，我做了晚饭并看了一部电影。

items.en: What did you do on Saturday?
I cleaned my room and cooked dinner.
items.zh: 我打扫了房间并做了晚饭。

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What did you do on Saturday?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I cleaned my room and cooked dinner.
lines.zh: 我打扫了房间并做了晚饭。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: After that, I cooked dinner and watched a movie.
lines.zh: 之后，我做了晚饭并看了一部电影。

items.en: On Saturday, I cleaned my room.
After that, I cooked dinner and watched a movie.
items.zh: 之后，我做了晚饭并看了一部电影。

items.en: Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
